pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 93, export_result.sh line 12, and task description all reference this exact filename
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 93, export_result.sh line 12 define OUTPUT_PATH=/home/ga/Documents/wholesale_leads.csv; task description requires file at this location

Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 76-79 explicitly creates 3 wholesale customers with loop: for i in {1..3}; EMAIL="wholesale${i}@example.com"; verifier.py line 34 uses these emails from metadata to validate the export

Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 82-85 explicitly creates 3 retail customers with loop: for i in {1..3}; EMAIL="retail${i}@example.com"; verifier.py line 35 uses these emails from metadata to ensure they are NOT in the exported CSV

privileged_info_summary: This task exports a customer segment from a Magento e-commerce system. The test data is synthetic and consists of 3 wholesale customers (wholesale1@example.com, wholesale2@example.com, wholesale3@example.com) and 3 retail customers (retail1@example.com, retail2@example.com, retail3@example.com) created programmatically in the setup_task.sh script. The expected output file is wholesale_leads.csv, to be located at /home/ga/Documents/wholesale_leads.csv. All metadata claims have been independently verified against the actual test data generation code and scripts.
